title: [MTR/NTE] PolyCity - Decorative objects
description: Pack of decorative objects in .obj format
body:
The pack adds several scripted objects in wavefront format, some of them have scripts, others are static.

Eye-candies:
* Billboard - has randomized advertising. You can add new advertisements by changing script
* Bus stop - a modern bus stop that also has randomized advertising
* Escalators - old metropolitan escalator with animated stairs. Has no collision, just a decoration
* Street stand - closes when night falls
* Trash bins - regular trash bins

Custom fences:
The resource pack contains several replacements for MTR rails in the form of a fence:
* Blank gray Russian Railways fence 
* Fence with barbed wire
